ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., urban, rural, suburban) */,
  "admin_code" TEXT /* Administrative code or identifier for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source (e.g., environmental, demographic) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, monthly, annually) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update from the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source's website or API endpoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash value of the file for integrity checks */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., text, markdown) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, MD) */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash value of the file for integrity checks */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the readme file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Organization or institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or application */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_logs" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "check_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality check */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  "check_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality check (e.g., script, manual) */,
  "check_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the quality check in seconds */,
  "check_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_checker_id FOREIGN KEY ("checker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation (e.g., completeness, consistency) */,
  "rule_threshold" REAL /* Threshold or limit for the validation rule */,
  "rule_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the rule should be applied (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "rule_status" TEXT /* Status of the rule (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "rule_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality check */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validation rule */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value obtained from the validation check */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the validation result */,
  "result_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the validation check in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_results_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES data_validation_rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_results_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_id") REFERENCES data_quality_logs ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing request */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being shared */,
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the data */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user approving the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "request_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the data sharing request */,
  "request_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the request */,
  "request_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the request process in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_requests_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_requests_requester_id FOREIGN KEY ("requester_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
